member.name: F:GTA.VehicleType.SubmarineCar
member.summary: The submarine car type for the submarine cars, which can travel underwater like submarines.

remarks.para:
Amphibious automobiles are not classified as this type but classified as
.

Submarines are not classified as this type but classified as
.
The corresponding name in vehicles.meta for this value is VEHICLE_TYPE_SUBMARINECAR .
The internal class in memory is CSubmarineCar , which is a subclass of CAutomobile .
